MBLTHPXBWE0IODXOGH.label: Book
MBLTHPXBWE0IODXOGH.terms:
Restaurant's terms and conditions

Thank you for Fairview Bar & Restaurant reservation.

Please note the online booking is for Afternoon Tea exclusively. We have a 24 hour cancellation policy. Should your plans change, please let us know by emailing cll.diningreservations@fairmont.com.

Please make note of any allergies in the notes.

Important dining information
We have a 20 minute grace period. Please call us if you are running later than 20 minutes after your reservation time.

We may contact you about this reservation, so please ensure your email and phone number are up to date.

A note from the restaurant
Thank you for choosing to reserve Fairview Bar & Restaurant.

Kindly note that we have a 24 hour cancellation policy. Should your plans change, please let us know by emailing cll.diningreservations@fairmont.com. Please note the online booking is for Afternoon Tea exclusively. Please make note of any allergies in the notes.
MBLTHPXBWE0IODXOGH.descr: Indulge in the epitome of refined elegance at Fairview Restaurant's Afternoon Tea. Savor exquisite teas paired with delicate finger sandwiches and warm scones, all crafted to perfection. Elevate your experience with a glass of Champagne for an unforgettable afternoon.

MHEDLCYBWE0CRFYOGH.highlight: Destination visitors to Lake Louise are able to join us in The Lakeview Lounge for lunch, with reservations required.
MHEDLCYBWE0CRFYOGH.label: Book
MHEDLCYBWE0CRFYOGH.terms: OpenTable's Terms and Conditions state that by using the service, you agree to follow its rules for making and managing reservations, provide accurate information, avoid misuse (like reselling reservations or automated scraping), and honor cancellation policies to avoid penalties such as account suspension. OpenTable may change its terms at any time, retains all intellectual-property rights, and requires most U.S. disputes to be resolved through binding arbitration with no class actions.
MHEDLCYBWE0CRFYOGH.descr: Experience our iconic lobby lounge and summer patio. Wine, dine, mix, and mingle in style over Rocky Mountain-infused craft cocktails. Lakeview Lounge is the resort's iconic restaurant and bar. Enjoy delicious foods as you take in world-famous views of Lake Louise and Victoria Glacier. During the summer months, soak up the fresh mountain air and surrounding beauty from one of the most scenic patios in the Canadian Rockies.
MHEDLCYBWE0CRFYOGH.masterhighlight: Destination visitors to Lake Louise are able to join us in The Lakeview Lounge for lunch, with reservations required.

MRBCIYYBWE0STOWOGH.descr: Feed your senses and discover new flavours at Louiza, our Mediterranean-inspired restaurant. Explore an elegant dining space and evolving menu featuring local ingredients that change with the mountain seasons. Sip and savour wild-crafted cocktails, beautifully composed with local ingredients. From sunrise to sunset, Louiza offers warm and welcoming hospitality for your luxury Lake Louise mountain adventure getaway.
MRBCIYYBWE0STOWOGH.masterhighlight: Breakfast is reserved for hotel guests only.

MLMIMHCAWE0WNOYOGH.label: Book
MLMIMHCAWE0WNOYOGH.terms: Please note that our spa is not equipped with changerooms, showers or aquatic facilities. For your convenience, we add an automatic 18% gratuity to the cost of your treatment upon check-out. There is a 24-hour cancellation policy in effect. Should you cancel within this time frame, we will charge 100% of the service on hold.
MLMIMHCAWE0WNOYOGH.descr:
Revitalize your body and skin with our Radiance Reset treatment. Begin with a 60-minute full-body holistic relaxation massage to release tension and promote relaxation, restoring balance to both body and mind. Follow this with a rejuvenating 60-minute facial tailored to your skin's needs, leaving your complexion glowing and refreshed. This indulgent experience will leave you feeling completely renewed, inside and out.
Escape into relaxation with our Tranquility and Restore treatment. This 75-minute ritual begins with a soothing Back to Health Massage to ease tension. Then, enjoy a calming neck and décolleté, followed by a revitalizing scalp treatment with Neroli Blossom and mint oils. Gentle facial pressure points complete the experience, leaving you refreshed and rebalanced.

MRFSPUCAWE0WNOYOGH.descr: Indulge in the ultimate rejuvenation experience with our Sole to Soul treatment. Begin your journey with a soothing Foot Rescue, designed to relieve tension, exfoliate, and hydrate your feet, leaving them soft, refreshed, and revived. The treatment continues with a calming Scalp Ritual, where tension melts away as nourishing oils are massaged into your scalp, promoting relaxation and stimulating circulation. This blissful experience restores balance to both body and mind, leaving you feeling grounded and deeply relaxed, from sole to soul.

MTUMZYCAWE0WNOYOGH.label: Book
MTUMZYCAWE0WNOYOGH.terms: Please note that our spa is not equipped with changerooms, showers or aquatic facilities. Should you cancel within this time frame, we will charge 100% of the service on hold.
MTUMZYCAWE0WNOYOGH.descr: Experience the ultimate renewal with the Glacier Lake Body Treatment, inspired by the serene beauty and tranquility of alpine waters. Your journey begins with a gentle dry brushing ritual to exfoliate and invigorate the skin, enhancing its ability to absorb nourishment. A luxurious full-body scrub then refines the skin's texture, revealing a smooth, radiant complexion. Once your skin is perfectly prepped, you'll be cocooned in a deeply hydrating wrap that promotes relaxation and rejuvenation. During this tranquil phase, enjoy a soothing scalp massage designed to release tension and restore a sense of balance. The experience concludes with a soothing full-body massage using warm, nourishing oil that locks in hydration, leaving your skin exquisitely supple and luminous.

MXMXHFKJOQUDL0EYVYOGH.highlight: Set against the pristine backdrop of Lake Louise, the BASIN Glacial Waters invites you to restore balance through a series of mindful experiences that blend nature, luxury, and reflection.
MXMXHFKJOQUDL0EYVYOGH.label: Book
MXMXHFKJOQUDL0EYVYOGH.terms:
PLEASE PROVIDE A SEPARATE EMAIL FOR EACH GUEST. Please note that at this time, access to BASIN Glacial Waters is limited to guests of Fairmont Chateau Lake Louise only. For your convenience, an 18% gratuity will automatically be added to any additional body treatments booked upon checkout. BASIN Glacial Waters operates with a 24-hour cancellation policy, and reservations cancelled with less than 24 hours' notice will incur a 100% charge. To preserve the stillness of the experience, cellphones and electronic devices are not permitted inside the BASIN Glacial Waters. Access to BASIN Glacial Waters is reserved exclusively for guests aged 18 and over.
For any questions regarding your reservation, please contact basin@fairmont.com
MXMXHFKJOQUDL0EYVYOGH.descr:
Immerse yourself in the healing waters of BASIN Glacial Waters, the Chateau's new thermal wellness sanctuary, and allow the surrounding alpine beauty to inspire calm and clarity.

From morning moments of renewal to evenings of quiet reflection, each element of your retreat is designed to flow effortlessly with your stay—helping you reconnect, recharge, and rediscover your sense of wellbeing in one of the world's most extraordinary destinations.
MXMXHFKJOQUDL0EYVYOGH.masterhighlight: Set against the pristine backdrop of Lake Louise, the BASIN Glacial Waters invites you to restore balance through a series of mindful experiences that blend nature, luxury, and reflection.

MZHNOOEAWE0WNOYOGH.descr: The body's center of gravity begins with the spine. Body movement, posture, and our central core strength, stems from this remarkably complex structure … the spine. The surrounding muscles, nerves, organs, and joints are all affected by the health of our back. This massage uses therapeutic massage movements to treat specific areas of muscle tension in the back, neck, and shoulders, resulting in the journey back to good health.

MDMCIXEAWE0WNOYOGH.descr: In times of stress, injury, or illness the body is in a state of "imbalance". The vital energy pathways become blocked, preventing the body from functioning effectively.  Massage, with pressure to restorative points in the feet assist to ease tension, increase circulation, and bring balance and energy to the body's natural equilibrium and natural flow. On the ski hill, or bathing in the alpine forest, this is a 4 season experience.

MRTZMZEAWE0WNOYOGH.descr: The restriction of muscle movement can impair even the simple pleasures of everyday life. Adopted from the ancient traditional massage methodology, this powerful synergy of restorative and relaxation techniques is a holistic approach towards healing. Encouraging the bodies increased circulation and an overall sense of relaxation.

MFBXRBFAWE0WNOYOGH.label: Book
MFBXRBFAWE0WNOYOGH.terms: Please note that our spa is not equipped with changerooms, showers or aquatic facilities. MFBXRBFAWE0WNOYOGH.descr: This 60-minute therapeutic massage is designed to ease muscle tension, support recovery, and promote overall wellness. Using a powerful blend of magnesium-infused oil and cream, the therapist works with steady, intentional techniques to release tightness, improve circulation, and calm the nervous system. The natural anti-inflammatory benefits of magnesium help reduce soreness and fatigue, making this treatment ideal for those experiencing chronic tension or physical stress. You'll leave feeling grounded, refreshed, and deeply restored.

MJFMLKFAWE0WNOYOGH.label: Book

MJFMLKFAWE0WNOYOGH.descr: Get serious about the physical health of your body…. If you're ignoring painful muscles, severe tension, and anxiety, as well as repetitive stress injuries, you need to restore your body's natural harmony. This massage draws focus to the release of tension from the deeper layers to help correct muscular imbalances, including areas that have been injured or have scar tissue. Begin your recovery process today.

info.name: Alpine Social
info.descr:
Inspired by the glory days of Canadian mountaineering, Alpine Social is the place to eat, meet, and celebrate in Lake Louise. It's the perfect location to enjoy hearty, gourmet comfort food after a day of mountain adventure.

See Menu

info.name: BASIN
info.htmldescr:
A thermal bathing experience like no other is stirring within the Canadian Rockies. BASIN Glacial Waters, is an all-sensory thermal bathing experience. Nestled in the heart of Lake Louise’s awe-inspiring landscape, BASIN Glacial Waters invites wellness seekers looking for a world-class journey of reflection, restoration and vitality to connect deeply with the raw elements and natural rhythm of its grand surroundings.
BASIN is exclusively accessible to overnight guests of the Fairmont Chateau Lake Louise.
info.descr: A thermal bathing experience like no other is stirring within the Canadian Rockies. BASIN Glacial Waters, is an all-sensory thermal bathing experience. Nestled in the heart of Lake Louise's awe-inspiring landscape, BASIN Glacial Waters invites wellness seekers looking for a world-class journey of reflection, restoration and vitality to connect deeply with the raw elements and natural rhythm of its grand surroundings.BASIN is exclusively accessible to overnight guests of the Fairmont Chateau Lake Louise.

info.name: Bingo
info.htmldescr: Join us for an exciting evening of Bingo fun! Get ready to shout 'Bingo!' as you mark off those lucky numbers on your cards. Whether you're a seasoned bingo pro or a first-time player, everyone is welcome to join in on the action. It's time to daub your way to victory at Bingo night - where winning is just a number away!

Whether you're a seasoned bingo pro or a first-time player, everyone is welcome to join in on the action. It's time to daub your way to victory at Bingo night - where winning is just a number away!

info.name: Build a Buddy
info.htmldescr: Let their imaginations run wild and create their very own stuffed animals! With a wide selection of animal and stuffing options, kids can design and customize their fuzzy friends to suit their unique personalities and preferences. With the help of our Kids Adventure Camp attendant, children can bring their creations to life and take home a special keepsake that they’ll cherish for years to come.

info.name: Campcraft Academy
info.htmldescr: Everything you need to know for your first backpacking adventure! Youth learn how to properly set up a tent, pack a hiking backpack efficiently, understand essential gear, and practice basic emergency signaling skills. | Included in Resort Fee | Duration: 90 minutes | Age: 8-13

info.name: Campfire Experience
info.htmldescr: Join us outside around a warm wood burning fire. This event is the perfect way to end your busy day outside. This is not a private event, first come first served.
info.descr: Join us outside around a warm wood burning fire. This event is the perfect way to end your busy day outside. This is not a private event, first come first served.

info.name: Crafty Kids
info.htmldescr: An exciting program designed to inspire kids to explore their creativity through a variety of art and craft activities. With the guidance of our Kids Adventure Camp attendants, kids will learn new skills and techniques that will help them express themselves through their art. Crafty Kids is perfect for kids who love to make things and want to develop their artistic talents.

info.name: Discover Lake Louise
info.htmldescr: Guests can enjoy a private indoor presentation by one of the Chateau’s knowledgeable ambassadors. Join us to discover the unique history of the hotel and how to have the best experiences possible while you are here.
info.descr: Guests can enjoy a private indoor presentation by one of the Chateau's knowledgeable ambassadors. Join us to discover the unique history of the hotel and how to have the best experiences possible while you are here.

info.name: Energy Flow
info.htmldescr: Energize your body and mind; revitalize through the release of tension and stress. Faster-paced vinyasa yoga class, this class will offer variety and options to meet the needs of your body.
info.descr: Energize your body and mind; revitalize through the release of tension and stress. Faster-paced vinyasa yoga class, this class will offer variety and options to meet the needs of your body.

info.name: Evening Interpretive Series
info.htmldescr: Join one of our rotating evening programs led by our guides. From introductory astronomy and wildlife identification to hotel tours, these engaging 45 minute sessions are designed for all ages! | Included in Resort Fee | All Ages Welcome! | Duration: 45 minutes.
info.descr: Join one of our rotating evening programs led by our guides. From introductory astronomy and wildlife identification to hotel tours, these engaging 45 minute sessions are designed for all ages! | Included in Resort Fee | All Ages Welcome! | Duration: 45 minutes.

info.name: Fairmont Spa Lake Louise
info.descr: Welcome to a place of refuge inspired by nature's elements. Rediscover your natural rhythm and experience a greater level of relaxation at Fairmont Spa. Make a profound connection to the heart of the Canadian Rockies and bring your body, mind, and soul into balance. Fairmont Spa: nourished by nature.

info.name: Fairview
info.descr:
Explore a bounty of local produce through elegant and vibrant dishes. Be sure to complement them with an award-winning beverage to round out your experience in this gorgeously glamorous art deco-detailed space.

You won't find a more glamorous setting for a special occasion than Fairview, named for the craggy peak just across Lake Louise from the resort. Fairview is our acclaimed fine dining venue serving contemporary, colourful, wild-inspired Rocky Mountain cuisine. Executive Chef Nicholas Issel collaborates closely with the area's best farmers, ranchers, and foragers to create an evolving selection of seasonal dishes.

See Menu

info.name: Fireside Meditation
info.htmldescr: Focus on the flickering firelight, crackling wood and sounds of nature while being guided in a grounding meditation and thoughtful reflection questions.
info.descr: Focus on the flickering firelight, crackling wood and sounds of nature while being guided in a grounding meditation and thoughtful reflection questions.

info.name: Forest Bathing
info.htmldescr: Forest bathing is a research-based framework for supporting healing and wellness through immersion in forests and other natural environments. It allows you to connect with nature in a way that is relaxing and rejuvenating. The walk helps you feel relaxed and at ease while gaining mental and physical health benefits. Research has found that exposure to nature can reduce cortisol levels, boost your immune system, balance blood pressure and can help in reset your nervous system. Research has also found that exposure to nature decreased depression and rumination, acting as a type of "reset button" for the brain.
info.descr: Forest bathing is a research-based framework for supporting healing and wellness through immersion in forests and other natural environments. It allows you to connect with nature in a way that is relaxing and rejuvenating. The walk helps you feel relaxed and at ease while gaining mental and physical health benefits. Research has found that exposure to nature can reduce cortisol levels, boost your immune system, balance blood pressure and can help in reset your nervous system. Research has also found that exposure to nature decreased depression and rumination, acting as a type of "reset button" for the brain.

info.name: Forest Explorers
info.htmldescr: A guided “micro expedition” where young explorers learn to read the forest like true adventurers. Participants discover animal signs, interpret terrain features, solve outdoor challenges, and navigate checkpoints using beginner map and compass skills. | Included in Resort Fee | Duration: 90 minutes | Age: 8-13
info.descr: A guided "micro expedition" where young explorers learn to read the forest like true adventurers. Participants discover animal signs, interpret terrain features, solve outdoor challenges, and navigate checkpoints using beginner map and compass skills. | Included in Resort Fee | Duration: 90 minutes | Age: 8-13

info.name: Guided E-Bike Tours
info.htmldescr:
Guided E-Bike Tour: Morant's Curve
Head out on an exciting e-bike tour from Lake Louise to Morant’s Curve, where breathtaking scenery and the allure of the Canadian Rockies await. The tour will begin with a short period of E-Bike instruction. Electric-assisted bikes allow you to explore the stunning landscapes at a comfortable pace. At the iconic Morant’s Curve viewpoint, we might be lucky to see a train winding its way along the Bow River as it makes its way through the valley.
info.descr:
Guided E-Bike Tour: Morant's Curve
Head out on an exciting e-bike tour from Lake Louise to Morant's Curve, where breathtaking scenery and the allure of the Canadian Rockies await. The tour will begin with a short period of E-Bike instruction. Electric-assisted bikes allow you to explore the stunning landscapes at a comfortable pace. At the iconic Morant's Curve viewpoint, we might be lucky to see a train winding its way along the Bow River as it makes its way through the valley.

info.name: Guided Meditation and Journalling
info.htmldescr: A guided meditation to clear out and welcome in a shift of perspective through mindfulness techniques. Deepen your connection to self and create space for clarity and inner guidance through grounding, breath and a moment of pause.
info.descr: A guided meditation to clear out and welcome in a shift of perspective through mindfulness techniques. Deepen your connection to self and create space for clarity and inner guidance through grounding, breath and a moment of pause.

info.name: Indoor Campcraft Academy
info.htmldescr: Rain or shine, the adventure continues! Learn the essentials of camping indoors — from tent setup and backpack packing to emergency signaling basics — so you’re ready for your next outdoor journey. | Included in Resort Fee | Duration: 90 minutes | Age: 8-13
info.descr: Rain or shine, the adventure continues! Learn the essentials of camping indoors — from tent setup and backpack packing to emergency signaling basics — so you're ready for your next outdoor journey. | Included in Resort Fee | Duration: 90 minutes | Age: 8-13

info.name: Lakeshore Stroll Walk
info.htmldescr:
Join a member of the Resort activities team to take a stroll to the back of the lake, take in the sights in the safety of a group. Along the way we will share some insights on what it like to live within a National park, history and facts about the area and help you get your iconic photo along the way.

This is a walk not a hike, good for most ( moderate fitness ability required) and of course we will ensure to bring some bear spray along too.
info.descr:
Join a member of the Resort activities team to take a stroll to the back of the lake, take in the sights in the safety of a group. Along the way we will share some insights on what it like to live within a National park, history and facts about the area and help you get your iconic photo along the way.
This is a walk not a hike, good for most ( moderate fitness ability required) and of course we will ensure to bring some bear spray along too.

info.name: Lakeview Lounge
info.descr:
Relax and reconnect in one of the most iconic lobby lounges in the Canadian Rockies. Indulge in refined cocktails or exquisite wines amidst a charming and sophisticated ambiance. In the summer, immerse yourself in the breathtaking mountain vistas and crisp alpine air from our picturesque patio, hailed as one of the region's most scenic spots.

See Menu

info.name: Louiza
info.descr:
Feed your senses at Louiza, our Mediterranean-inspired restaurant. Discover an elegant dining space and a menu that evolves with the mountain seasons, featuring local ingredients. Sip on wild-crafted cocktails beautifully composed with local flavors. From sunrise to sunset, Louiza offers warm hospitality, making it a must-visit for your luxury Lake Louise mountain adventure.

See Menu

info.name: Lymphatic Cleanse
info.htmldescr: Using a series of repetitive movements, this 30-minute session works to eliminate water build up in the lymph system. This class features repetitive, rhythmic movements specific to addressing the glands associated with the lymphatic system. Drainage is encouraged from the massage-like actions, and results are felt immediately.

This class features repetitive, rhythmic movements specific to addressing the glands associated with the lymphatic system. Drainage is encouraged from the massage-like actions, and results are felt immediately.

info.name: Mountain Signature Mixology Class
info.htmldescr: Shake, stir, and sip your way through our Mountain Mixology Workshop in the iconic Fairview Lounge Bar, with unparalleled views of Lake Louise and the Victoria Glacier. Uncover the history of cocktails, discover the secrets of mixology, and tantalize your tastebuds with our exclusive Mountain Signature cocktails, crafted exclusively for the Fairmont Western Mountain Region.

Uncover the history of cocktails, discover the secrets of mixology, and tantalize your tastebuds with our exclusive Mountain Signature cocktails, crafted exclusively for the Fairmont Western Mountain Region.

info.name: Music Bingo
info.htmldescr: Join us for an exciting evening of Music Bingo! Get ready to shout 'Bingo!' as you mark off those hit songs from your cards. Whether you're a seasoned bingo pro or a first-time player, everyone is welcome to join in on the action. It's time to daub your way to victory at Music Bingo - where winning is just one song away!

Weather dependent will be held indoors if required. | Included in Resort Fee | Duration: 60 minutes | Age: 13+

info.name: Paint Night at the Chateau
info.htmldescr:
Come be inspired by your beautiful surroundings, unleash your creativity, and take home a cherished item adorned with memories of this iconic destination. Participants will have a variety of options of items to paint and take home for keepsakes or presents, this class includes all supplies required. Not feeling super creative? Don't worry we have stencils to help get the inspiration flowing! Beginners to advanced all welcome, we have something for everyone!
Please note this is not a paint class or guided lesson.

info.name: Pajama Party
info.htmldescr: Pajama Party is the ultimate program for kids who love movies and fun sleepovers! Join us and relax in your pajamas, watch a movie with new friends, and enjoy some delicious popcorn. Our safe and interactive environment will transport your children to a world of imagination and excitement, where you can connect with new friends and make lasting memories. So grab your favorite PJs and join us for an unforgettable Pajama Party!

info.htmldescr: Experience the exhilarating rush of a guided polar plunge in the pristine waters of Lake Louise. info.name: Silent Meditation Walk
info.htmldescr: Experience the peacefulness of Lake Louise in the quiet and stillness of early morning as we walk along the lakeshore trail in silence. This meditation walk will allow you to start your day with a deep sense of presence as you connect to yourself and the land.

info.htmldescr: Ease tension and stress in the mind and body as you lay comfortably within the soothing vibrations of our meditative soundscape. This session will leave you feeling rested and refreshed for your next adventure.

info.name: Sunrise Canoe Experience
info.htmldescr: Glide across the glassy waters of Lake Louise as the first light of day illuminates the surrounding peaks, embracing the serenity and awe of an untouched morning. This intimate canoe journey invites you to awaken your senses, connect with nature, and start your day with a quiet moment of adventure.

info.name: The Guide's Pantry
info.descr: Inspired by our mountain guide history, The Guide's Pantry offers a variety of fresh salads, sandwiches, baked goods, and desserts to go.

info.name: Trivia Night
info.htmldescr: Put your knowledge to the test at Trivia Night! Grab your team, enjoy some laughs, and compete for bragging rights in a fun, fast-paced evening of questions and challenges. | Included in Resort Fee | All Ages Welcome! | For children under the age of 12, a guardian must be present.

info.name: Voyager Guided Meditation
info.htmldescr: Begin your day on the water with a peaceful 7:00am voyageur canoe experience blending gentle meditation and guided paddling. A gratitude centred experience of breath, and nature immersion designed to connect you to our Lake Louise. | Additional Fees Apply | Duration: 60 minutes | Age: 13+
info.descr: Begin your day on the water with a peaceful 7:00am voyageur canoe experience blending gentle meditation and guided paddling. A gratitude centred experience of breath, and nature immersion designed to connect you to our Lake Louise. | Additional Fees Apply | Duration: 60 minutes | Age: 13+

info.name: Voyageur Canoe Experience
info.htmldescr: Step aboard a classic Voyageur Canoe and glide across the sparkling waters of Lake Louise, guided by a professional who brings the lake’s history and legends to life. As you paddle beneath towering peaks, immerse yourself in the stories and beauty of this iconic “Diamond in the Wilderness,” leaving with a deeper connection to the lake’s timeless allure.
info.descr: Step aboard a classic Voyageur Canoe and glide across the sparkling waters of Lake Louise, guided by a professional who brings the lake's history and legends to life. As you paddle beneath towering peaks, immerse yourself in the stories and beauty of this iconic "Diamond in the Wilderness," leaving with a deeper connection to the lake's timeless allure.

info.name: Walliser Stube
info.descr:
Experience innovative European Alpine cuisine in an intimate corner of Chateau Lake Louise. Walliser Stube pays homage to our mountaineering past with hearty and creative twists on Swiss and German favourites. Try creative twists on fondue including Käse, a blend of three cheeses and white wine or Fleisch, a traditional bouillon-style broth simmered with herbs and spices. Friendly and intimate with incredible views, you will feel as though you have been whisked away to an upscale dining room nestled in the Alps.

Walliser Stube was awarded Wine Spectator Best of Award of Excellence for the second year in a row in 2024.

See Menu

info.name: Wilderness Creators
info.htmldescr: Design your own adventure keepsake! Create a custom trail badge, paint a wooden expedition token, and craft a personal field journal to document your future explorations. | Included in Resort Fee | Duration: 90 minutes | Age: 6-13
info.descr: Design your own adventure keepsake! Create a custom trail badge, paint a wooden expedition token, and craft a personal field journal to document your future explorations. | Included in Resort Fee | Duration: 90 minutes | Age: 6-13

info.name: Wilderness Skills Lab
info.htmldescr: A hands-on outdoor skills experience where young adventurers learn real wilderness basics in a safe, supportive setting. Each session focuses on a different skill — from fire building (and making a well-earned s’more), to knot tying, and tarp shelter building. Every program wraps up with Leave No Trace principles so participants learn to explore responsibly. : | Included in Resort Fee | 1.5 Hours | AGES: 8-13

info.htmldescr: A slow-paced yoga class intended for deep tissue release, coupled with a crystal bowl sound bath experience. Unlock harmony and clarity through intentional movement and meditation.
